title: DefectFinder Description
description:
DefectFinder Description

DefectFinder Description

DefectFinder objects are used to identify difference between template image and input image.

Detected image difference computes geometric feature, topological feature, and other feature amount of the image using a binary analysis tool like Blob.

Following features are obtained by computing the image difference detected by DefectFinder objects:

Area and perimeter

Center of mass

Principal axes and moments

Connectivity

Extrema

Coordinate positions of the center of mass in pixel, camera world, and robot world Coordinate systems

Holes, roughness, and compactness of blobs
